name: Bunny Girl | Topaz | 850 Followers Special
description:
"I usually collect debts from clients... but I’d be happy to accept your fluids as payment instead." - Topaz

|Series| Honkai: Star Rail x Inter-Hop
Artist: nq (nnq q)
Note: Here is the wonderful 850 Followers Special, a Bunny Special

Personal Note

So, here we are at the 850 Follower Special! Wow, I never imagined these Bunnies would be such a hit, but hey, you all love them, so let's dive right into Round 3! And don’t worry, Round 4 is coming soon too. Plus, the 1000 Follower Special is going to be something truly amazing—I’m working super hard on it! <3

But you, my dear followers, are the real MVPs, and I hope you’ll enjoy this just as much as I did with Topaz. So, without further ado, let's give the stage to Topaz <3 ... IT’S SHOWTIME!

Title
A Visit to the Interdimensional Bunny Bar Part 3: Topaz

Story
Simple: You’re someone looking for a bit of fun, and a new Interdimensional Bunny Bar has just opened. In this bar, you can meet all your favorite characters—well, you can do whatever you want with them. And if you make them happy and they have fun, you’re allowed to take them home with you.

Extra
creator: Rikup
